_README: Deterministic analysis-object fixture for the Morrison V&V40 COU2 case (VAD, long duration, MRL 5). Hand-built to match the shape pipeline.finalize produces, exercising all three reviewer reconciliations: scoped-out factors (-> 'Not applicable'), missing=[] with sub-100% completeness (-> reconcile clause), and Critical/High/Medium severities (-> single 'Moderate' wording).

weakeners.description: Input data provenance is undocumented for the long-duration use.
Validation activity has limited relevance to the long-duration context of use.
Test conditions only partially cover the long-duration operating range.

headline: 3 weakeners fired (1 Critical, 1 High, 1 Medium); 6 of 13 credibility factors assessed.

context.cou_description: A centrifugal blood pump used for long-duration ventricular assist support. The computational model predicts hemolysis to support a safety argument at higher model risk.

authenticity.statement: This evidence was assessed in an unsigned demo, so identity and tamper-evidence were not verified. A formally issued assurance package would carry a content hash and a cryptographic signature, shown here for a reviewer (or a technical colleague) to re-verify.
